paradigm: CMT v2 MLP-only ablation 5-bb in_vivo retest pre-register

bb_registry.expected_v2_outcome: rel_distribution informative OR HCSF-C confirmed (still degenerate)
rel pattern matches axis 95 v1 cross-link (HMK-A clean)
rel informative (smaller hybrid likely fine in v1, must remain so in v2)
rel informative (independent family confirmation of fix)

frozen_hypotheses.name: SCALE_NORM
frozen_hypotheses.statement: magnitude renormalization (dY_norm = abs(dY)/sqrt(h_dim)) alone restores informative cross-scale comparability
frozen_hypotheses.decision_threshold: CONFIRMED if dY_norm std/mean ratio across 5 bb falls within [0.5, 2.0] band; FALSIFIED if any bb falls outside

frozen_hypotheses.name: HID_DIM_BOUND
frozen_hypotheses.statement: MLP-only sub-module ablation (vs whole-layer) is required for rel<1 informative at 12B+
frozen_hypotheses.decision_threshold: CONFIRMED if Mistral-Nemo-12B v2 rel std > 0.05 AND v1 rel std < 0.005 (saturation gone); FALSIFIED if v2 rel std remains < 0.005

frozen_hypotheses.name: ARTIFACT_OF_HYBRID
frozen_hypotheses.statement: gemma-2-9b hybrid attention has separate degeneracy cause beyond MLP saturation
frozen_hypotheses.decision_threshold: CONFIRMED if gemma-2-9b v2 rel std remains < 0.01 even after MLP-only fix AND gemma-2-2b v2 rel std > 0.05; REJECTED if gemma-2-9b v2 rel std > 0.05

pre_register_status: FROZEN_PRE_MEASUREMENT (raw#10 honest: any post-hoc threshold revision = re-pre-register required)
